What's New in Webex Suite
Feedback?
Take a look at what’s happening with Webex Suite. Here’s your first stop to see what we're releasing each month with messaging, calling,      meetings and integrations in the app. Be sure to subscribe to this article to keep      up-to-date.
Announcements
General
Messaging
Calling
Meetings
Coming Soon
June 25, 2026
Updated app versions
We've released an update for Webex App 46.6, this update contains some stability fixes. The
        following app version corresponds to today's updates:
Windows—46.6.1.35236
Mac—46.6.1.35236
Linux—46.6.1.35236
VDI—46.6.1.35236
June 16, 2026
The following app versions correspond to today's releases. See
Webex App | Release
          Notes
to get information about the issues resolved with these releases. We recently
        submitted the mobile apps to the app stores for review, and you'll be able to download them
        after they're approved and posted.
Windows—46.6.0.35178
Mac—46.6.0.35178
Linux—46.6.0.35178
VDI—46.6.0.35178
iPhone and iPad—46.6
Android—46.6
End of Support—iOS 17 and iPadOS 17
We are updating the system requirements for Webex App on Apple devices. Starting with the
        release of version 46.7 on July 7, 2026, we will officially end support for iOS 17 and
        iPadOS 17.
Affected applications
Webex App for iPhone and iPad
Webex for Intune app for iPhone and iPad
Timeline
New users: You'll no longer be able to download Webex App for iOS 17 or iPadOS 17,
              after July 7, 2026.
Existing users: You can continue using version 46.7 on these operating systems until
              February 2, 2027. We encourage you to upgrade your operating system before this date
              to ensure you continue to access the latest features and security updates.
After February 2, 2027, Webex App will no longer function on these operating
              systems.
June 5, 2026
Update for June release date
For our June (46.6) release for Webex App, we're planning to release on June 16th.
May
May 26, 2026
Updated app versions
We've released an update for Webex App 46.5, this update contains some stability fixes. The
        following app version corresponds to today's updates:
Windows—46.5.0.35006
Mac—46.5.0.35006
May 20, 2026
Update for June release date
For our June (46.6) release for Webex App, we're planning to release on June 9th.
May 19, 2026
Update for Slow Channel Webex App 46.3 (March)
We've released an update for Webex App 46.3 (March) slow channel version, this update
        contains some stability fixes and these versions of the app are available to administrators
        in Control Hub. See
Release notes
to get information about the issues
        resolved with this release.
The following are the app versions that correspond to today's update:
Windows—46.3.2.34954
Mac—46.3.2.34954
VDI—46.3.2.34954
May 13, 2026
The following app versions correspond to today's releases. See
Webex App | Release
          Notes
to get information about the issues resolved with these releases. We recently
        submitted the mobile apps to the app stores for review, and you'll be able to download them
        after they're approved and posted.
Windows—46.5.0.34931
Mac—46.5.0.34931
iPhone and iPad—46.5
Android—46.5
End of Support—iOS 17 and iPadOS 17
We are updating the system requirements for Webex App on Apple devices. Starting with the
        release of version 46.7 on July 7, 2026, we will officially end support for iOS 17 and
        iPadOS 17.
Affected applications
Webex App for iPhone and iPad
Webex for Intune app for iPhone and iPad
Timeline
New users: You'll no longer be able to download Webex App for iOS 17 or iPadOS 17,
              after July 7, 2026.
Existing users: You can continue using version 46.7 on these operating systems until
              February 2, 2027. We encourage you to upgrade your operating system before this date
              to ensure you continue to access the latest features and security updates.
After February 2, 2027, Webex App will no longer function on these operating
              systems.
May 12, 2026
We're planning to release Webex App for May a little later. We just wanted to let you know
        about this change, and we'll post an update on May 13th.
April
April 22, 2026
We've released an update for Webex App 46.4, this update contains some stability fixes. The

April 8, 2026
The following app versions correspond to today's releases. See

to get information about the issues resolved with these releases. We recently

April 7, 2026
We're planning to release Webex App for April a little later. We just wanted to let you
        know about this change, and we'll post an update on April  8th.
End of Support—iOS 17 and iPadOS 17
We are updating the system requirements for Webex App on Apple devices. Starting with the
        release of version 46.7 on July 7, 2026, we will officially end support for iOS 17 and

Affected applications
Webex App for iPhone and iPad
Webex for Intune app for iPhone and iPad
Timeline

Existing users: You can continue using version 46.7 on these operating systems until

After February 2, 2027, Webex App will no longer function on these operating
              systems.
March
March 31, 2026
Slow Channel
We've added the March 46.3 release for Windows: 46.3.1.34493, Mac: 46.3.1.34493, VDI:
        46.3.1.34493, and the February release for Linux: 46.2.1.34187, to the slow channel versions
        that are available to administrators in Control Hub (See
Webex App
          desktop update controls
).
This release includes all the features and bug fixes since the October 45.10 release to the
        slow channel. Check out the tabs in this article to see the features released during these
        months and the
release notes
to see all the bug fixes.
March 24, 2026
Updated app versions
We've released an update for Webex App 46.3, this update contains some stability fixes. The
        following app version corresponds to today's update.
Windows—46.3.1.34493
Mac—46.3.1.34493
VDI—46.3.1.34493
Update for Personal Insights
The Personal Insights feature in Webex App will be retired on May 25th, 2026. After this date the tab will removed.
March 4, 2026
The following app versions correspond to today's releases. See
Webex App | Release
          Notes
to get information about the issues resolved with these releases. We recently
        submitted the mobile apps to the app stores for review, and you'll be able to download them

Windows—46.3.0.34324
Mac—46.3.0.34324
iPhone and iPad—46.3

March 3, 2026
We're planning to release Webex App for March (46.3) a little later. We just wanted to let
        you know about this change, and we'll post an update on March 4th.
February
February 11, 2026
Webex Expands Data Residency Capabilities in Australia
Webex data residency in Australia is now live. Previously Webex Calling services were
        already hosted in Sydney and Melbourne data centers , and Webex meetings & Webinar
        primary data center was hosted in Sydney. With this latest expansion, we have also
        established backup data center for Webex Meetings and Webinars in Melbourne.
In addition, core Webex services including Messaging, Polling & Q&A (Slido),
        Translation & Transcription, Identity, Analytics, Key Management, AI Assistant, Logs and
        more, are now also data resident within Australia. This expansion supports our commitment to
        providing customers with secure, reliable, and locally hosted collaboration experiences. For
        more information, see
Data residency in Webex
February 10, 2026
We've released an update for Webex App 46.2, this update contains some stability fixes. The
        following app version corresponds to today's update.

We have a few things to tell you about our 2026 schedule:
For our January release, we're planning to just include some critical fixes and

Webex App will continue to release on the first Tuesday of every month.

By continuing to use our website, you acknowledge the use of cookies.
Privacy Statement
Change Settings
Consent Manager
Your opt out preference signal is honored.
Consent Manager
Your Privacy
Strictly Necessary Cookies
Performance Cookies
Targeting Cookies
Functional Cookies
Your Privacy
When you visit any website, it may store or retrieve information on your browser, mostly in the form of cookies. This information might be about you, your preferences or your device and is mostly used to make the site work as you expect it to. The information does not usually directly identify you, but it can give you a more personalized web experience. Because we respect your right to privacy, you can choose not to allow some types of cookies. From the list on left, please choose whether this site may use Performance and/or Targeting Cookies. By selecting Strictly Necessary Cookies only, you are requesting Cisco not to sell or share your personal data. Note, blocking some types of cookies may impact your experience on the site and the services we are able to offer.
Strictly Necessary Cookies
Always Active
These cookies are necessary for the website to function and cannot be switched off in our systems. They are usually only set in response to actions made by you which amount to a request for services, such as setting your privacy preferences, logging in or filling in forms.    You can set your browser to block or alert you about these cookies, but some parts of the site will not then work. These cookies do not store any personally identifiable information.
Cookies Details
Performance Cookies
Performance Cookies
These cookies provide metrics related to the performance and usability of our site. They are primarily focused on gathering information about how you interact with our site, including: page load times, response times, error messages, and allowing a replay of a visitor’s interactions with our site, which enables us to review and analyze visitor behavior, helping to improve site usability and functionality. These cookies also allow us to count visits and traffic sources so we can measure and improve the performance of our site. They help us to know which pages are the most and least popular and see how visitors move around the site. If you do not allow these cookies we will not know when you have visited our site and will not be able to monitor its performance.
Cookies Details
Targeting Cookies
Targeting Cookies
These cookies may be set through our site by our advertising partners. They may be used by those companies to build a profile of your interests and show you relevant adverts on other sites.    They do not store directly personal information, but are based on uniquely identifying your browser and internet device. If you do not allow these cookies, you will experience less targeted advertising.
Cookies Details
Functional Cookies
Functional Cookies
These cookies enable the website to provide enhanced functionality and personalisation. They may be set by us or by third party providers whose services we have added to our pages. If you do not allow these cookies then some or all of these services may not function properly.
Cookies Details

hits.title: uBlock Origin Maintainer on Chrome vs. Firefox WebExtensions
Tell HN: Cisco WebEx on OS X uses the same pre-installer tricks as Zoom
Show HN: Fed up with WebEx, so we built a way to screen share in under 20 sec.
Firefox 54: E10S-Multi, WebExtension APIs, CSS Clip-Path
Cisco: Magic WebEx URL Allows Arbitrary Remote Command Execution
Firefox 57 as the first release where only WebExtensions will be supported
Safari is adopting an extensions API similar to Firefox’s WebExtensions
Safari 14 added WebExtensions support, so where are the extensions?

analysis.name: Webex
analysis.tagline: The most advanced generative AI-powered platform for hybrid work and customer experience
analysis.value_proposition: Enterprise collaboration suite unifying messaging, calling, meetings, and contact center with Cisco AI Assistant across a broad app/integration ecosystem
analysis.ideal_customer: large enterprises and regulated industries (healthcare, finance, government, education) needing unified communications, contact center, and Cisco-integrated hybrid work

pricing.notes: Pricing page returned Access Denied (Akamai edge block); tier structure not captured. Webex historically offers Free, Meet, Suite, and Enterprise plans but specific prices could not be verified from provided sources.
